category_sources: Official GitHub README says the package provides command-line utilities relating to inotify for shell scripts.
source_facts.description says it provides a C library and command-line programs for inotify.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository and source_facts.name use inotify-tools.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary project documentation surface.
Official GitHub repository contains a man directory, and README directs users to the man pages for details.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/inotify-tools/inotify-tools; per instruction, repo returned as null and not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README identifies inotify command-line utilities for shell scripts.
Official repository topics include linux, fsnotify, inotify, inotifywait, and inotifywatch.
source_facts.description identifies inotify library and command-line programs.
